## Summary

Describe the change in 2-5 lines.

## Why

Explain why this change was needed.

## Changed Surfaces

List the files or document families touched.

## Sources Checked

List the primary sources, official docs or repository references used.

## Validation

- [ ] Relative links were checked.
- [ ] No personal genomic data or secrets were added.
- [ ] Medical and research boundaries still read correctly.
- [ ] Publication-readiness implications were reviewed if relevant.

## Publication Impact

Does this change affect README framing, provenance, legal boundaries, community health or GitHub publication safety?
